subcodes.first_line: We have hearkened unto Thy call and answered Thee, for I am the Answerer; and We have witnessed Thy turning toward Us, so We turned unto Thee, for I am the All-Seeing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد سمعنا ندائک اجبناک و انا المجیب و راینا اقبالک اقبلنا الیک و انا البصیر
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @consolation and comfort
